prompt: Two powerful fantasy women standing back-to-back in the center of a vast cherry blossom field at dusk, full-body heroic composition, seen from a slightly low angle, ultra-detailed cinematic anime-realism. The woman on the left has vivid crimson red short layered hair, a curvy athletic build, and a fierce dominant presence; she wears a black and dark red strappy battle outfit with a cropped leather top, high-cut bottoms, garter-like thigh straps, flowing translucent red ribbons, and long glossy black armguards. The woman on the right has golden blonde with soft pink ends wavy shoulder-length hair, an athletic curvy build, and extensive floral tattoo sleeves and body tattoos across her arm, shoulder, ribs, and thigh; she wears a black and purple strappy fantasy outfit with sheer purple fabric panels, chain accents, and black gloves. Their bare upper backs press together as they face opposite directions with calm, intimidating confidence. There are exactly 2 massive glowing energy swords planted upright in the ground behind and beside them: 1 on the left radiating molten red-orange fire and ember-like cracks, and 1 on the right radiating electric violet and cyan energy with lightning coursing through the blade. The scene is set in a breathtaking sakura landscape with dense pink cherry trees, countless petals swirling violently through the air, a dramatic sunset sky filled with magenta, purple, and orange clouds, distant lightning, and a glowing horizon over a Japanese-inspired cityscape with a pagoda visible on the right. Emphasize raw power, sensual elegance, high contrast rim lighting, wind-blown fabric and hair, luminous particle effects, rich red-versus-purple color contrast, epic fantasy atmosphere, hyper-detailed rendering, sharp focus on the two women, and painterly cinematic depth.
